scripts.dev: npm run wp:start && npm run composer:install && vite --host 0.0.0.0
scripts.composer:install: npx wp-env run cli bash -lc 'cd /var/www/html/wp-content/themes/proenem-wordpress-theme && composer install'
scripts.i18n:pot: npx wp-env run cli -- wp i18n make-pot /var/www/html/wp-content/themes/proenem-wordpress-theme /var/www/html/wp-content/themes/proenem-wordpress-theme/languages/proenem-wordpress-theme.pot --domain=proenem-wordpress-theme --exclude=assets/dist,coverage,dist,docs,node_modules,scripts,tests,vendor --headers='{"Language-Team":"Proenem","POT-Creation-Date":""}' --skip-js
scripts.i18n:mo: npx wp-env run cli -- wp i18n make-mo /var/www/html/wp-content/themes/proenem-wordpress-theme/languages
scripts.i18n: npm run i18n:pot && npm run i18n:po && npm run i18n:mo
scripts.i18n:check: npm run i18n && git diff --exit-code -- languages
scripts.lint:php: npx wp-env run cli bash -lc 'cd /var/www/html/wp-content/themes/proenem-wordpress-theme && vendor/bin/phpcs'
scripts.lint:php:fix: npx wp-env run cli bash -lc 'cd /var/www/html/wp-content/themes/proenem-wordpress-theme && vendor/bin/phpcbf'
scripts.lint:php:syntax: npx wp-env run cli bash -lc 'cd /var/www/html/wp-content/themes/proenem-wordpress-theme && find . \( -path "./dist" -o -path "./vendor" -o -path "./node_modules" -o -path "./assets/dist" \) -prune -o -name "*.php" -print0 | xargs -0 -n1 php -l'
scripts.test:static: npm run build && npm run i18n:check && npm run lint:php:syntax && npm run lint:php && npm run theme:check
scripts.test:php: npx wp-env run tests-cli bash -lc 'wp --path=/var/www/html theme activate proenem-wordpress-theme && cd /var/www/html/wp-content/themes/proenem-wordpress-theme && vendor/bin/phpunit --configuration phpunit.xml.dist'
scripts.test:e2e: npx wp-env run cli wp theme activate proenem-wordpress-theme && playwright test
scripts.test: npm run test:static && npm run test:php && npm run test:e2e
scripts.theme:check: npx wp-env run cli wp eval-file /var/www/html/wp-content/themes/proenem-wordpress-theme/scripts/run-theme-check.php
scripts.validate: npm run test && npm run theme:zip && npm run theme:validate-zip
